intro: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a flowering plant extract that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. Its extract is rich in flavonoids, essential oils, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Achillea millefolium extract is often used in skincare products and herbal remedies to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation.
